title: MC Trailer Modpack
description: This modpack looks just like the Minecraft trailer.
body:
The MC Trailer Modpack aims to replicate the captivating visuals and atmosphere seen in the official Minecraft game trailers. Here are the key features of this modpack:

Server-friendly: It won’t impact gameplay mechanics.

Client-side enhancements: Focused on improving visuals and audio.

Included components:

Edited BSL Shaders: Provides stunning lighting effects, shadows, and reflections.

Barebones Texturepack

Improved Player Animations

Fresh Animations

Dive into your trailer like Minecraft adventure!
